title: PlayerAlerts
description: Get notified when a user enters your render distance in 1.21
body:
# PlayerAlert
See when another user enters your view distance in minecraft!
- **Useful for Lifesteal, SMP, UHC (PvP)**

---

## Why?

- **Be warned before your opponents sneak up on you**
- **Coordinate surprise-attacks against lone players**
- **Easily know the numbers advantage of any fight**

---

### Features

- Minimalistic and simple ui
- Multiple alert modes
- Modmenu integration

---

> Made with 💙

---
